cityDNA.coreFantasy: A titanborn mountain civilization where border walls, manor terraces, archive towers, training arenas, observatories, memory tablets, and titan-hand steps make scale into public law.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Colossi Prime is not merely oversized; the uploaded images show scale translated into institutions, terraces, archives, high residences, training grounds, and public memory.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Colossi Prime turns mountain mass, titanborn bodies, public inscriptions, guarded thresholds, elite terraces, archives, training, and stone-giant memory into visible civic order.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Granite, bronze, cast iron, blue granite, arcane glow, cyclopean steps, memory tablet walls, border beacons, manor courts, archive towers, woven banners, champion gates, and cliffside terraces.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Titanborn civic culture where endurance, memory, rank, training, border defense, and public inscription define legitimacy.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Titan hands, colossus steps, memory tablets, border lamps, blue order sigils, carved totems, manor terraces, star observatories, and champion gates symbolize law made massive.

canonLocks: Colossi Prime is a mature titanborn cliff-terrace civilization, not merely oversized architecture.
The Wonder is Titan Hand Terrace of the Colossus Steps.
The Beacon is Border Wall Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Memory Tablet Walls Colossus Registry.
The uploaded street sources cover four districts: Fortress / Border Wall, High Residential, Records / Archives, and Arena / Training.

Exact uploaded anchors include Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall Beacon, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook, High Residential Civic Hall, Manor Court, Hanging Gardens Monument, Salon Pavilion Nook, Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook, Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, and Champion Gate Nook.

CPE-STREET-S5 image and sidecar are missing from this upload; hero sidecars show Star Observatory as a secondary major landmark, but exact S5 civic hall / monument / nook anchors are not locked from this batch.
provisionalCanon: Colossi Prime's strongest civic read is awe under discipline shaped into institutions.
Star Observatory appears as hero-source evidence for a likely fifth district, but without S5 street source it must remain source-limited.
rejectedReads: titanborn spectacle without archives, borders, residences, and training systems
cautionFlags: Missing CPE S5 source: do not invent exact S5 civic hall, monument, or nook anchors.
Keep titan scale tied to memory, law, border defense, high residential status, archives, and training.
Preserve exact uploaded sidecar anchor names.

environment.environmentalLogic: Mountain scale is civic infrastructure: roads, stairs, walls, terraces, archives, and training arenas turn titanborn bodies into public spatial grammar.

forms: Titan Hand Terrace of the Colossus Steps
skyline: Titan Hand Terrace of the Colossus Steps as far wonder anchor
Memory Tablet Walls Colossus Registry as central authority
Border Wall Beacon as signal landmark
archive towers, manor courts, training arenas, and hero-view Star Observatory arranged across colossal terraces

civilization.people: Titanborn citizens are shown as civic actors whose size is normalized by architecture: they pass through huge gates, courts, archives, terraces, and training grounds built to make scale accountable.
civilization.governance: Memory Tablet Walls Colossus Registry governs through public inscriptions, sealed archives, audience terraces, command platforms, border rulings, residence status, and training obligations.
civilization.religion: Stone-giant memory, titan-hand steps, ward networks, ritual geometry, carved totems, and public endurance rites make scale sacred-adjacent.

streets.appearance: Colossal stone streets, terrace stairs, blue ward lamps, border walls, manor courts, archive towers, memory tablets, and arena grounds make every route feel public and load-bearing.
streets.movement: Movement follows titan-scale stairs, wall roads, high residential terraces, archive approaches, arena routes, and broad public plazas.
streets.lighting: Civic blue ward light and bronze reflection emphasize scale, inscriptions, and public thresholds.
streets.weatherEffects: Wind, high sun, rain streaks, and cliff fog make stairs, walls, and signal lights essential.
streets.dayCycle: Border checks, court petitions, archives, manor business, and training dominate daytime.
streets.nightCycle: Blue ward lamps, guarded walls, archive windows, and arena torches dominate night.

housing.wealthy: High residential manor courts with hanging gardens, monumental balconies, bronze fittings, and private terrace access.
housing.middle: Archive, border, and training-family homes built into terraces with large halls and shared stone courts.
housing.poor: Service terraces and worker housing along lower stairs, with shared water, heavy doors, and practical access to public routes.

districts.name: Fortress / Border Wall
districts.civicPurpose: Access control, public signal, frontier defense, and threshold law.
districts.visualIdentity: Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall Beacon, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook.

districts.name: High Residential
districts.civicPurpose: Status display, manor influence, gardened elite life, and public-facing hospitality.
districts.visualIdentity: High Residential Civic Hall, Manor Court, Hanging Gardens Monument, Salon Pavilion Nook.

districts.name: Records / Archives
districts.civicPurpose: Public memory, legal continuity, copied truth, and record authority.
districts.visualIdentity: Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook.

districts.name: Arena / Training
districts.civicPurpose: Disciplined strength, public testing, champion recognition, and readiness.
districts.visualIdentity: Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, Champion Gate Nook.

wonder.name: Titan Hand Terrace of the Colossus Steps
wonder.symbolicRole: Titan memory, mountain scale, public endurance, and civic ascent made monumental.
wonder.visualRole: Far skyline wonder of titan-hand forms, immense steps, granite terraces, bronze fittings, and arcane blue seams.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide rites, public vows, memorial ceremonies, and ascent trials.
storyHooks: A titan-hand step bears an inscription too large for ordinary citizens to read without help.

beacon.name: Border Wall Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Threshold law and citywide warning made visible.
beacon.visualRole: Blue-lit beacon integrated with border walls, woven banners, and watch bastions.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates border defense, archive alerts, arena readiness, and high-residential response.
storyHooks: A Beacon change makes the city's enormous calm turn at once.

seatOfPower.name: Memory Tablet Walls Colossus Registry
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Names, duties, memory, and law made physically colossal.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Central registry with memory tablet walls, audience terraces, sealed archives, and command platforms.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Governs public records, border status, high-house petitions, archive rulings, and training duties.
storyHooks: A name carved too high on the wall assigns a duty nobody below can ignore.

majorLandmarks.name: Manor Court
majorLandmarks.visualRole: High terrace manor court with hanging gardens, salon pavilion, and titan-scale entries.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Elite petitions, hospitality, patronage, and social authority.
storyHooks: A salon pavilion conversation weighs more than a public speech.

majorLandmarks.name: Archive Tower
majorLandmarks.symbolicRole: Public memory made vertical and durable.
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Archive tower with gold-seal monument, copyist hall, stone stairs, and memory-tablet approaches.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Records, legal copies, and continuity of public memory.
storyHooks: A copyist hall preserves a smaller version of a truth carved too large to question.

majorLandmarks.name: Training Arena
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Titan-scale arena with woven banners, champion gate, terraces, and heavy training forms.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Training, public tests, champion recognition, and readiness ceremonies.
storyHooks: The Champion Gate opens only after someone proves restraint, not strength.

majorLandmarks.name: Star Observatory
majorLandmarks.symbolicRole: Hero-source evidence for high astronomical authority, source-limited without S5 street material.
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Visible secondary hero-view landmark associated with section 5, but exact district anchors are unavailable in this upload.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Probable observatory / astronomy function; keep provisional until CPE-STREET-S5 is supplied.
storyHooks: Star Observatory should not receive exact S5 nook or monument treatment until the missing S5 source is supplied.

districtDioramaGuidance: S1 must show Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall Beacon, Woven Banners Monument, and Watch Bastion Nook.
S2 must show High Residential Civic Hall, Manor Court, Hanging Gardens Monument, and Salon Pavilion Nook.
S3 must show Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, and Copyist Hall Nook.
S4 must show Arena / Training Civic Hall, Training Arena, Woven Banners Monument, and Champion Gate Nook.
Do not author S5 district diorama specifics until CPE-STREET-S5 source material exists.
mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Titan Hand Terrace of the Colossus Steps, Border Wall Beacon, and Memory Tablet Walls Colossus Registry legible together.
Use granite, bronze, cast iron, blue granite, arcane glow, cyclopean stairs, border walls, manor courts, archive towers, training arenas, memory tablet walls, and cliffside terraces.
requiredVisualElements: Titan Hand Terrace of the Colossus Steps
Star Observatory as source-limited hero landmark
